module:
Linguistic-based tag extraction strategy.

This module provides a strategy that leverages the linguistics interface
to extract tags based on linguistic analysis of text.

DefaultLinguisticConsumer.docstring:
Default implementation of a linguistic consumer for tag extraction.
    
    Consumes linguistic units and converts them to tag candidates.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the linguistic consumer.
        
        Args:
            importance_threshold: Minimum importance for linguistic units
            confidence_factors: Confidence multipliers by unit type
            **kwargs: Additional options

capabilities.docstring: Get capabilities of this linguistic consumer.

negotiate_capabilities.docstring:
Negotiate capabilities with the requester.
        
        Args:
            requested_capabilities: Capabilities requested by consumer
            
        Returns:
            Negotiated capabilities (intersection of requested and supported)

consume_linguistic_units.docstring:
Convert linguistic units to tag candidates.
        
        Args:
            text: Text that was analyzed
            unit_types: Types of linguistic units to convert
            **options: Additional options
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects derived from linguistic analysis

NounPhraseTagStrategy.docstring: Strategy that extracts tags from noun phrases using linguistic analysis.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the noun phrase tag strategy.
        
        Args:
            consumer_name: Name of the linguistic consumer to use
            unit_types: Types of linguistic units to extract
            **kwargs: Additional options

extract_tags.docstring:
Extract tags using linguistic noun phrase analysis.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to extract tags from
            max_tags: Maximum number of tags to extract
            min_confidence: Minimum confidence threshold
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects
